chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 801 - وَ سَأَلَهُ أَبُو بَصِيرٍ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي فِي حَرٍّ شَدِيدٍ فَيَخَافُ عَلَى جَبْهَتِهِ مِنَ اَلْأَرْضِ قَالَ «يَضَعُ ثَوْبَهُ تَحْتَ جَبْهَتِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.801 - Abu Basir asked Him about a man praying in extreme heat and fearing for his forehead due to the hot ground.
Imam (as) replied: "He should place his garment beneath his forehead”.
